title: agrostis borealis var. hyperborea
intro: Agrostis borealis var. hyperborea, commonly known as Arctic Bentgrass, is a type of grass native to the Arctic tundra regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Arctic Bentgrass include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and fighting off infections. In traditional herbal medicine, Arctic Bentgrass is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically in the form of a salve or poultice.
